message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'inet_getpeer_v4' sets signal field 'inetpeer_addr.family', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=inetpeer_addr;field=family;offset=16] [oracle:assert=inetpeer_addr.family stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets family without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
